ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location or site */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the subject or location (possibly normalized) */,
  "cyst" INTEGER /* Presence of cyst (0 or 1) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subject (e.g., F, L) */,
  "gc" REAL /* General health condition (GC) value */,
  "gc_loc" TEXT /* Location of the GC measurement */,
  "t" REAL /* Temperature (T) value */,
  "t_antibody" TEXT /* Type of antibody used */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "rain_median_30days" REAL /* Median rainfall over the past 30 days */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "temp_midpoint" REAL /* Midpoint temperature */,
  "rain_count" INTEGER /* Number of rain events */,
  "z_gc" REAL /* Z-score for GC */,
  "z_t" REAL /* Z-score for T */,
  "leader" INTEGER /* Indicator if the subject is a leader (0 or 1) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collector" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who collected the data */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* ID or description of the equipment used for data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data collection event */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_name FOREIGN KEY ("name") REFERENCES locations ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_t_antibody FOREIGN KEY ("t_antibody") REFERENCES antibodies ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_gc_loc FOREIGN KEY ("gc_loc") REFERENCES gc_locations ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location or site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the location's details */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location (e.g., phone, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health condition */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the health condition (e.g., °C, mmol/L) */,
  "normal_range" TEXT /* Normal range for the health condition */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the health condition's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antibodies" (
  "antibody_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antibody */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the antibody */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the antibody */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the antibody */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the antibody */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the antibody's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antibody_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., F, L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the status details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gc_locations" (
  "gc_loc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GC location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the GC location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GC location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the GC location in meters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the GC location's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gc_loc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection event */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "rain_median_30days" REAL /* Median rainfall over the past 30 days */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "temp_midpoint" REAL /* Midpoint temperature */,
  "rain_count" INTEGER /* Number of rain events */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, NE, E) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "z_scores" (
  "z_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each z-score record */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection event */,
  "z_gc" REAL /* Z-score for GC */,
  "z_t" REAL /* Z-score for T */,
  "z_gc_description" TEXT /* Description or interpretation of the GC z-score */,
  "z_t_description" TEXT /* Description or interpretation of the T z-score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("z_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_z_scores_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaders" (
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leader record */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection event */,
  "is_leader" INTEGER /* Indicator if the subject is a leader (0 or 1) */,
  "leader_role" TEXT /* Role of the leader (e.g., team leader, project manager) */,
  "leader_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaders_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (e.g., in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the readme file for integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, MD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)
